_comment: Bench mixed-workload H9 (BACKLOG 2026-05-09). 12 task alternati 7B/14B-Q2/30B-MoE per forzare 11 swap continui e misurare overhead. Prompt sono realistic mini-task (no file edit, solo inference) per isolare swap overhead pulito da Aider/OpenCode internals.
_design: Ordine alternato: T1-7B, T5-14B, T9-30B, T2-7B, T6-14B, T10-30B, T3-7B, T7-14B, T11-30B, T4-7B, T8-14B, T12-30B. 11 transizioni modello = 11 swap forced.

tasks.prompt:
Identify the bug in this Python function and reply with the fixed version:

def divide(a, b):
    return a / b

# called: divide(10, 0)
